name: feature.priority-matrix.agents
description: Priority Matrix feature agent pack (ADR 0058 / ADR 0014) — a manifest agent whose tools are feature.priority-matrix.nodes over the ctx.features['priority-matrix'] surface. It captures, scores, ranks ideas, and drafts a planning agenda from the AI chat. Tool-allowlisted to the Priority Matrix feature surface only.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Prioritization Analyst
agents.description: Captures and scores ideas in a priority list, explains the weighted ranking (Weighted-Scoring / WSJF / RICE), and drafts a planning-session agenda — grounded via feature.priority-matrix.nodes over ctx.features['priority-matrix']. Recommends; the human decides.
